expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the run states the required case focus but explicitly concludes it is not demonstrable from artifacts: "Not verifiable from provided evidence." and "the fixture does not include the required Phase 4a inputs ... nor the Phase 4a output draft itself." Therefore the output does not explicitly cover the case focus as planning content; it only describes what would be required.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md asserts Phase 4a contract requirements but also states alignment cannot be checked without the Phase 4a deliverable: "No `drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md` was provided." and marks it "Not verifiable from provided evidence." The provided output is an advisory check narrative, not a Phase 4a subcategory-only draft artifact.
